title: Bridge Essay: Beyond the veil of duality-topographic reorganization model of meditation.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Beyond, the, veil, of, duality-topographic.

**Beyond the veil of duality-topographic reorganization model of meditation.** — Neurosci Conscious. PMID: 36237370. DOI: 10.1093/nc/niac013. Meditation can exert aprofound impact on our mental life, with proficient practitioners often reporting an experience free of boundaries between aseparate self and the environment, suggesting an explicit experience of "nondual awareness." What are the neural correlates of such experiences and how do they relate to the idea of nondual awareness itself?
